behavior_summary: llmWiki.enabled = false -> disable backend helper-model API usage and stay in repo-local mode.
llmWiki.enabled = true -> allow bounded backend helper-model actions such as draft-source-summary.
This file does not switch the main Hermes/chat conversation to a different model.

_enabled_meaning.false: No helper-model API calls. Ask/query preview and analysis save remain repo-local and deterministic.
_enabled_meaning.true: Enable backend-only helper-model API routes for bounded draft generation.

models.title: Cheap Helper Chat Model
models._note: Current code uses models[0] only. Provider must currently be 'openai', but apiBase may point to any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

embeddingsProvider._note: Parsed by the loader, but not actively used by the current draft-source-summary route.

rerankerProvider._note: Parsed by the loader, but not actively used by the current draft-source-summary route.
